mapper.select: SELECT favorite_id as favoriteId, user_id as userId, file_id as fileId, create_time as createTime FROM file_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND file_id = #{fileId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_favorite(user_id, file_id, create_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{fileId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM file_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO file_favorite(user_id, file_id, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.fileId}, #{item.createTime})
